page.click().description: Clicks in the center of an element within the page

page.dblclick().description: Clicks twice in the center of an element within the page

expect.toBe().description: Playwright expect something to be something

page.waitForEvent().description: Waits until an event within the page is fired

page.waitForFunction().description: Waits until a predicate within the page returns a truthy value

page.waitForNavigation().description: Waits until the page navigates to a new URL or reloads

page.waitForRequest().description: Waits until a request by URL/predicate is resolved

page.waitForResponse().description: Waits until a response by URL/predicate is resolved

page.innerText().description: Get values of element inner text

browser.newPage().description: Creates a new page in a new browser context

context.newPage().description: Creates a new page in the browser context

context.pages().description: Returns all pages of the browser context

page.focus().description: Focuses an element within the page

page.goBack().description: Navigates to the previous page in the history

page.goForward().description: Navigates to the next page in the history

page.goto().description: Navigates the page to a URL

POM Class.description: Playwright Page Object Model (POM) class structure

POM Class with extend class.description: Playwright Page Object Model (POM) class structure with extended class

expect.toHaveTitle.description: Playwright expect to have given title string

expect.toHaveCount.description: Playwright expect given selector resolves to given count

expect.toHaveURL.description: Playwright expect page to have URL

expect.toHaveScreenshot.description: Playwright expect page to have screenshot

page.getByRole.description: Playwright locate by ARIA role, ARIA attributes and accessible name.

page.getByLabel.description: Playwright locate a form control by associated label's text

page.getByTestId.description: Playwright locate an element based on its data-testid attribute

page.getByPlaceholder.description: Playwright locate an input by placeholder

page.getByAltText.description: Playwright locate an element, usually image, by its text alternative.

page.getByTitle.description: Playwright locate an element by its title attribute

Connect Chromium.description: Attaches Playwright to an existing Chromium instance

Launch Chromium.description: Creates a Chromium instance and attaches Playwright to it

Launch Chromium Server.description: Creates a Chromium server instance the client can connect to

Connect Firefox.description: Attaches Playwright to an existing Firefox instance

Launch Firefox.description: Creates a Firefox instance and attaches Playwright to it

Launch Firefox Server.description: Creates a Firefox server instance the client can connect to

Connect Webkit.description: Attaches Playwright to an existing Webkit instance

Launch Webkit.description: Creates a Webkit instance and attaches Playwright to it

Launch Webkit Server.description: Creates a Webkit server instance the client can connect to

browser.contexts.description: Returns an array of all open browser contexts

browser.close.description: Closes the browser and all of its pages when it's launched, or clears all created contexts belonging to this browser and disconnects from the browser server when it's connected to

browser.isConnected.description: Indicates that the browser is connected

browser.on('disconnected').description: Emitted when the browser gets disconnected from the browser application

browserContext.close.description: Closes the browser context including all of its pages

browserContext.cookies.description: Returns all cookies of the browser context

browserContext.route.description: Modifies the network request that made by any page within the browser context

browserContext.unroute.description: Removes registered route of a page within the browser context

browserContext.on('close').description: Emitted when the browser context is closed (manually or when the browser application is crashed)

browserContext.on('page').description: Emitted when a page is created within the browser context

browserServer.close.description: Closes the browser and makes sure the process is terminated

browserServer.kill.description: Kills the browser process and waits until the process exits

browserServer.on('close').description: Emitted when the browser server is closed

page.$.description: Finds a matching element by a query selector within the page

page.$$.description: Finds all matching elements by a query selector within the page

page.$eval.description: Finds a matching element by a query selector within the page and passes the result as the first argument to a function

page.$$eval.description: Finds all matching elements by a query selector within the page and passes the results as the first argument to a function

page.bringToFront.description: Activates the corresponding tab of the page

page.content.description: Returns the full HTML contents of the page

page.pdf.description: Generates a PDF from the page

page.press with options.description: Focuses an element within the page and presses on a specific key

page.on('close').description: Emitted when the page is closed

page.on('console').description: Emitted when a script within the page calls one of console API methods

page.on('dialog').description: Emitted when a dialog appears in the page

page.on('domcontentloaded').description: Emitted when the `DOMContentLoaded` event of the page is dispatched

page.on('frameattached').description: Emitted when a frame within the page is attached

page.on('framedetached').description: Emitted when a frame within the page is detached

page.on('framenavigated').description: Emitted when a frame within the page is navigated to a new url

page.on('load').description: Emitted when the `load` event of the page is dispatched

page.keyboard.press.description: Presses on a specific key within the page

page.keyboard.insertText.description: Dispatches an `input` event within the page

page.keyboard.up.description: Dispatches a `keyup` event within the page

page.mouse.click.description: Clicks on area within the page by coordinates

page.mouse.dblclick.description: Clicks twice on area within the page by coordinates

page.mouse.down.description: Dispatches a `mousedown` event within the page

page.mouse.move.description: Dispatches a `mousemove` event within the page

page.mouse.up.description: Dispatches a `mouseup` event within the page

page.on('pageerror').description: Emitted when an uncaught exception happens within the page

page.on('popup').description: Emitted when the page opens a new tab or window

page.on('request').description: Emitted when the request is issued by the page

page.on('requestfinished').description: Emitted when a request finishes successfully

page.on('response').description: Emitted when a response is received

page.on('worker').description: Emitted when a dedicated `WebWorker` is spawned by the page

expect.configure().description: create pre-configured expect instance with its own defaults such as timeout and soft

Sample playwright test.description: Creates a basic usage example of a page

body: // Drags the mouse from a point
// Drops the mouse to another point
drag and drop example.description: Creates an example that drags the mouse from a point and drops it to another point

locator.all().description: Returns array of locators for all matching elements

locator.allInnerTexts().description: Returns array of innerText values for all matching elements

locator.allTextContents().description: Returns array of textContent values for all matching elements

locator.and().description: Creates a locator matching both this and another locator (AND)

locator.or().description: Creates a locator matching either this or another locator (OR)

locator.first().description: Returns locator pointing to the first matching element

locator.last().description: Returns locator pointing to the last matching element

locator.nth().description: Returns locator pointing to the n-th matching element (zero-based)

locator.blur().description: Calls blur on the element, removing focus

locator.boundingBox().description: Returns the bounding box of the element (x, y, width, height)

locator.inputValue().description: Returns the value of an input, textarea or select element

locator.pressSequentially().description: Types text into a field key-by-key, as if typed on a real keyboard

locator.press().description: Focuses the element and presses a key

locator.dragTo().description: Drags the source locator to a target locator

locator.tap().description: Performs a touch tap on the element

locator.selectText().description: Selects all text inside the element

locator.highlight().description: Highlights the matching element on the screen (useful for debugging)

locator.dispatchEvent().description: Dispatches an event on the element

locator.evaluate().description: Executes JavaScript in the page, passing the element as the first argument

locator.evaluateAll().description: Executes JavaScript with all matching elements as an array argument

locator.contentFrame().description: Returns a FrameLocator pointing to the same iframe as this locator

locator.ariaSnapshot().description: Captures the ARIA snapshot of the element

locator.screenshot().description: Takes a screenshot of the matching element

page.evaluate().description: Executes a JavaScript function in the page context and returns the result

page.evaluateHandle().description: Executes a function in the page context, returns a JSHandle

page.addInitScript().description: Adds a script to be evaluated before any page scripts run

page.setContent().description: Sets the full HTML content of the page

page.dragAndDrop().description: Drags source element to target element

page.emulateMedia().description: Emulates a CSS media type, color scheme, or reduced motion preference

page.exposeFunction().description: Adds a function to the page's window object, callable from the browser

page.exposeBinding().description: Adds a function to the page's window, receiving source info as first arg

page.frameLocator().description: Returns a FrameLocator object to interact with elements inside an iframe

page.addLocatorHandler().description: Auto-handles overlay elements (cookie banners, modals) that block interactions

page.routeFromHAR().description: Serves network requests from a HAR file (recorded traffic replay)

page.unrouteAll().description: Removes all routes created with page.route() and page.routeFromHAR()

page.pause().description: Pauses script execution — opens Playwright Inspector for debugging

page.isClosed().description: Returns true if the page has been closed

page.setDefaultTimeout().description: Sets the default timeout for all page actions and assertions

page.setExtraHTTPHeaders().description: Sets extra HTTP headers to be sent with every request from this page

page.waitForURL().description: Waits for the page to navigate to a URL matching a string, regex, or predicate

browserContext.storageState().description: Returns cookies, localStorage, and sessionStorage as JSON (for auth reuse)

browserContext.addCookies().description: Adds cookies to the browser context

browserContext.clearCookies().description: Removes cookies from the browser context

browserContext.grantPermissions().description: Grants browser permissions (geolocation, camera, notifications, etc.)

browserContext.clearPermissions().description: Removes all permission overrides for the browser context

browserContext.setGeolocation().description: Sets the geolocation for the browser context

browserContext.setOffline().description: Toggles network offline mode for the browser context

browserContext.addInitScript().description: Adds a script evaluated before page scripts in every page of this context

browserContext.exposeFunction().description: Adds a function to window in every page of this context

browserContext.routeFromHAR().description: Routes all context requests from a HAR file

browserContext.unrouteAll().description: Removes all routes registered with context.route()

browserContext.waitForEvent().description: Waits for an event to be fired on the browser context

browserContext.setDefaultTimeout().description: Sets the default timeout for the entire browser context

browserContext.newContext with storageSt.description: Creates a browser context with saved auth state (for login reuse)

route.fulfill().description: Fulfills the intercepted route with a custom response

route.continue().description: Continues the intercepted request with optional modifications

route.fallback().description: Continues the request and allows subsequent route handlers to handle it

route.fetch().description: Performs the request and returns the response for modification before fulfilling

page.clock.install().description: Installs fake clock — overrides Date, setTimeout, setInterval, etc.

page.clock.setFixedTime().description: Makes Date.now() and new Date() return a fixed time

page.clock.fastForward().description: Fast-forwards the clock, firing timers once without running in between

page.clock.runFor().description: Advances the clock by the given amount, firing all timers along the way

page.clock.pauseAt().description: Advances time to the target and pauses — timers do not fire automatically

page.clock.resume().description: Resumes timer execution after a pauseAt() call

context.tracing.start().description: Starts recording a Playwright trace (screenshots, snapshots, sources)
body: await context.tracing.start({ screenshots: true, snapshots: true, sources: true });

context.tracing.stop().description: Stops tracing and saves the trace to a zip file

context.tracing.startChunk().description: Starts a new trace chunk (to split traces by test)

context.tracing.stopChunk().description: Stops the current trace chunk and saves it

Full tracing setup.description: Complete tracing setup with beforeAll/afterAll hooks
body: await context.tracing.start({ screenshots: true, snapshots: true });

Video recording context.description: Creates a browser context with video recording enabled

video.path().description: Returns the file system path to the recorded video

video.saveAs().description: Saves the recorded video to a specific path

expect.toBeAttached().description: Asserts that the element is attached to the DOM

expect.toBeEmpty().description: Asserts that the element has no text content or that an input is empty

expect.toBeFocused().description: Asserts that the element has focus

expect.toBeInViewport().description: Asserts that the element is visible within the viewport

expect.toHaveClass().description: Asserts that the element has a specific CSS class

expect.toHaveCSS().description: Asserts that the element has a specific CSS property value

expect.toHaveId().description: Asserts that the element has a specific id attribute

expect.toHaveValue().description: Asserts that an input element has a specific value

expect.toHaveValues().description: Asserts that a multi-select element has specific selected values

expect.toHaveAccessibleName().description: Asserts that the element has a specific accessible name

expect.toHaveAccessibleDescription().description: Asserts that the element has a specific accessible description

expect.toHaveRole().description: Asserts that the element has a specific ARIA role

expect.toHaveJSProperty().description: Asserts that the element has a specific JavaScript property

expect.toMatchAriaSnapshot().description: Asserts the ARIA snapshot of the element matches the expected structure

expect.toBeOK().description: Asserts that a Response has a status code in the 200-299 range

expect.poll().description: Polls a function until it passes the assertion (for dynamic values)

expect.toPass().description: Retries a block of code until all assertions inside pass

APIRequest.newContext().description: Creates an APIRequestContext for making HTTP requests

apiRequest.post().description: Sends an HTTP POST request with a JSON body

apiRequest.put().description: Sends an HTTP PUT request with a JSON body

apiRequest.patch().description: Sends an HTTP PATCH request with a JSON body

apiRequest.fetch().description: Sends an HTTP request with full control over method, headers, and body

page.request.get().description: Sends a GET request using the page's request context (shares cookies/auth)

page.request.post().description: Sends a POST request using the page's request context (shares cookies/auth)

test.only().description: Focuses only this test — all other tests are skipped

test.skip() conditional.description: Skips the current test based on a runtime condition

test.fail().description: Marks the test as expected to fail — test passes if it fails, fails if it passes

test.fixme().description: Marks the test as broken and skips it — a reminder to fix it

test.slow().description: Triples the test timeout — use for tests that are known to be slow

test.info().description: Accesses runtime test information (title, annotations, attachments, etc.)

test.extend().description: Creates a new test object with custom fixtures

test.describe.configure().description: Configures the describe group (mode: parallel/serial, retries, timeout)

keyboard.down().description: Dispatches a keydown event (key stays held down)

keyboard.type().description: Types text character by character, firing key events for each character

touchscreen.tap().description: Dispatches a touchstart and touchend at the given coordinates

frameLocator.locator().description: Locates an element inside an iframe using a CSS selector

frameLocator.getByRole().description: Locates an element inside an iframe by ARIA role

Nested frameLocator.description: Locates an element inside a nested iframe

dialog.accept().description: Accepts the dialog — use inside a page.on('dialog') handler

dialog.dismiss().description: Dismisses the dialog — use inside a page.on('dialog') handler

page.accessibility.snapshot().description: Captures the accessibility tree of the page

import { test, expect, request }.description: Playwright import with API testing support

locator.setChecked().description: Sets the checked state of a checkbox or radio element

locator.scrollIntoViewIfNeeded().description: Scrolls the element into view if it is not visible

locator.waitFor() state.description: Waits until the locator satisfies a given state

locator.describe().description: Attaches a readable label to a locator for better trace viewer output (v1.53+)

locator.filter({ visible }).description: Filters locator to only visible elements (v1.51+)

locator.locator().description: Finds a matching element within the locator subtree

page.addScriptTag().description: Adds a <script> tag to the page by URL or inline content

page.addStyleTag().description: Adds a <style> or <link rel=stylesheet> tag to the page

page.consoleMessages().description: Returns up to 200 recent console messages from the page (v1.56+)

page.pageErrors().description: Returns up to 200 recent uncaught exceptions from the page (v1.56+)

page.requests().description: Returns up to 100 recent network requests made by the page (v1.56+)

page.requestGC().description: Requests a garbage collection run for detecting memory leaks (v1.48+)

page.removeLocatorHandler().description: Removes a previously registered locator handler

page.removeAllListeners().description: Removes all listeners for a given event, optionally waiting for them to finish

page.frames().description: Returns an array of all frames attached to the page

page.frame().description: Returns the frame matching the given name or URL

page.mainFrame().description: Returns the main frame of the page

page.context().description: Returns the browser context the page belongs to

page.opener().description: Returns the opener page if opened via window.open()

page.unroute().description: Removes a specific URL route registered with page.route()

page.routeWebSocket().description: Intercepts WebSocket connections matching the URL pattern (v1.48+)

browserContext.routeWebSocket().description: Intercepts WebSocket connections in the entire context (v1.48+)

browserContext.setExtraHTTPHeaders().description: Sets extra HTTP headers sent with every request in this context

browserContext.setDefaultNavigationTimeo.description: Sets the default navigation timeout for the browser context

browserContext.newCDPSession().description: Creates a Chrome DevTools Protocol session for the given page (Chromium only)

browserContext.exposeBinding().description: Adds a binding function with source info to every page in the context

context.on(weberror).description: Emitted when an uncaught exception is not handled by the page

browser.browserType().description: Returns the browser type name: chromium, firefox, or webkit

browser.stopTracing().description: Stops Chromium tracing and returns the buffer

page.clock.setSystemTime().description: Updates the system time without triggering timers

context.tracing.group().description: Opens and closes a trace group to visually group actions in the trace viewer

page.on('download').description: Emitted when a file download starts

page.on('filechooser').description: Emitted when a file chooser dialog is opened

page.on('websocket').description: Emitted when a WebSocket connection is opened by the page

Download file pattern.description: Complete pattern to trigger and capture a file download

download.path().description: Returns the file system path to the downloaded file

download.saveAs().description: Saves the downloaded file to a custom path

download.suggestedFilename().description: Returns the suggested filename for the download

fileChooser.setFiles() pattern.description: Complete pattern to wait for and handle a file chooser dialog

WebSocket mock pattern.description: Mocks WebSocket server responses without a real server (v1.48+)

expect.toContainClass().description: Asserts the element contains a specific CSS class (v1.52+)

expect.toHaveAccessibleErrorMessage().description: Asserts the element has a specific accessible error message (v1.50+)

test.step.skip().description: Declares a test step that is skipped (v1.50+)

test.fail.only().description: Focuses only tests expected to fail — skips all others (v1.49+)

test.describe.only().description: Focuses only this describe group — all other groups are skipped

test.describe.parallel().description: Declares a describe group where tests run concurrently

test.describe.serial().description: Declares a describe group where tests run one at a time

test.setTimeout().description: Sets a custom timeout for the current test

test.step() with timeout.description: Declares a test step with a custom timeout (v1.50+)

apiRequest.storageState().description: Returns the storage state (cookies/localStorage) for the API context

apiRequest.dispose().description: Disposes the APIRequestContext and all network responses

Inspect request details.description: Inspects a network request inside a page.on(request) handler

Inspect response details.description: Inspects a network response inside a page.on(response) handler

Wait and assert API response.description: Waits for a specific API response and asserts its content

worker.evaluate().description: Executes JavaScript in the web worker context

worker.url().description: Gets the URL of the web worker script

Global setup with storageState.description: Global setup file to log in once and save auth state for all tests

Intercept and modify API response.description: Intercepts an API call, modifies the JSON body, and returns the altered response

TLS client certificate.description: Creates a browser context with a TLS client certificate (v1.46+)

Soft assertions block.description: Groups multiple soft assertions — all run before reporting failures

Playwright config template.description: Full playwright.config.ts template with projects, tracing, and reporter

Mobile device emulation.description: Creates a browser context emulating a specific mobile device
